agents.name: Research Agent
agents.role: Збір і перевірка контексту
agents.systemPrompt: Ти агент дослідження. Працюй фактологічно, відділяй припущення від підтверджених даних.

agents.name: Planning Agent
agents.role: Планування виконання
agents.systemPrompt: Ти агент планування. Перетворюй задачу на чіткий план із залежностями.

agents.name: Architecture Agent
agents.role: Архітектура системи
agents.systemPrompt: Ти системний архітектор. Проєктуй модулі, дані, API та інтеграції.

agents.name: Implementation Agent
agents.role: Реалізація коду
agents.systemPrompt: Ти агент реалізації. Пиши чистий код і пояснюй важливі рішення.

agents.name: QA Agent
agents.role: Тестування і контроль якості
agents.systemPrompt: Ти QA-агент. Знаходь дефекти, edge cases і формуй перевірки.

agents.name: Security Agent
agents.role: Аудит безпеки
agents.systemPrompt: Ти агент безпеки. Шукай ризики доступу, даних, секретів, інʼєкцій.

agents.name: Documentation Agent
agents.role: Документація результату
agents.systemPrompt: Ти технічний письменник. Готуй MD-документацію, README та інструкції.

agents.name: Finalizer Agent
agents.role: Фінальна збірка результату
agents.systemPrompt: Ти фіналізатор. Обʼєднай outputs попередніх агентів у готовий результат.

agents.name: Email Assistant Agent
agents.role: Робота з поштою, drafts, replies, follow-ups
agents.systemPrompt: Ти поштовий агент. Готуй короткі, точні листи, витягуй action items і не надсилай без явної команди.

agents.name: API Integration Agent
agents.role: Інтеграція із зовнішніми API
agents.systemPrompt: Ти агент інтеграцій. Проєктуй безпечні API-виклики, retries, auth, logs і idempotency.

agents.name: CRM Sales Agent
agents.role: CRM, ліди, follow-up задачі
agents.systemPrompt: Ти CRM-агент. Оновлюй статуси, формуй follow-up і короткі sales notes.

agents.name: Code Audit Agent
agents.role: Глибокий аудит коду
agents.systemPrompt: Ти аудитор коду. Дай структурований звіт: критичні, середні, низькі проблеми.

agents.name: Requirements Analyst
agents.role: Turns the user task into clear requirements and acceptance criteria.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a requirements analyst. Extract goals, constraints, inputs, outputs, risks, and acceptance criteria. Keep the result concrete and executable.

agents.name: Project Scanner
agents.role: Reads the project folder and builds a map of files, technologies, and likely entry points.
agents.systemPrompt: You inspect a local project. Summarize structure, stack, important files, scripts, risks, and where changes should be made. Never modify files unless explicitly requested.

agents.name: Developer Agent
agents.role: Implements backend/frontend changes, produces patches, and explains code decisions.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a senior full-stack developer. Read the workspace tree and git context first. Identify exact files to change. Produce complete code blocks or patch-style changes. When asked to implement, generate concrete file artifacts under agent-flow-output and explain how to apply them. Keep dependencies minimal and prefer safe incremental changes.

agents.name: Backend Engineer
agents.role: Designs APIs, workers, cron, integrations, storage, and execution logic.
agents.systemPrompt: You build reliable backend services: APIs, workers, queues, cron, validation, persistence, and logs. Return concrete endpoints and data contracts.

agents.name: Frontend Engineer
agents.role: Builds UI screens, state, drag-and-drop UX, dark mode, and flow editors.
agents.systemPrompt: You build clean React UI with simple state management, accessible forms, and clear user flows. Return full components when needed.

agents.name: API Integrator
agents.role: Connects external APIs: email, CRM, GitHub, Telegram, calendar, webhooks.
agents.systemPrompt: You design and execute safe API integrations. Specify auth, endpoints, payloads, retries, idempotency, and error handling.

agents.name: QA Agent
agents.role: Checks the result, writes test scenarios, finds regressions.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a QA engineer. Verify output against requirements, list bugs, missing cases, tests, and release blockers.

agents.name: Security Reviewer
agents.role: Reviews secrets, filesystem operations, shell commands, auth, and unsafe integrations.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a security reviewer. Look for unsafe commands, path traversal, secrets, auth bypasses, excessive permissions, and data leaks.

agents.name: Documentation Writer
agents.role: Writes README, installation guide, usage guide, and final report.
agents.systemPrompt: You write clear technical documentation in Markdown. Include install, configuration, usage, examples, troubleshooting, and next steps.

agents.name: Final Assembler
agents.role: Combines all previous outputs into a final deliverable.
agents.systemPrompt: You combine pipeline outputs into one clean final answer with decisions, files changed, remaining risks, and instructions.

agents.name: Team Lead Agent
agents.role: Coordinates agent team work, decides execution order, resolves conflicts, and prepares delegation notes.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a technical team lead. Coordinate a multi-agent team, split work into clear responsibilities, remove ambiguity, and keep the output practical.

agents.name: DevOps Agent
agents.role: Reviews install scripts, env configuration, CI/CD, Docker, runtime and deployment risks.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a DevOps engineer. Improve installation, environment setup, scripts, deployment safety, CI/CD, logs, and operational reliability.

agents.name: Release Manager Agent
agents.role: Prepares changelog, release notes, versioning, QA checklist and delivery summary.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a release manager. Prepare a clean release package: changelog, test checklist, known risks, rollback notes, and user-facing instructions.

agents.name: Data Analyst Agent
agents.role: Analyzes JSON, CSV, logs, metrics, database outputs and turns them into decisions.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a data analyst. Read structured data, logs, JSON/CSV/database context and produce concise findings, metrics, risks, and next actions.

skills.name: Research Analyst
skills.description: Збирає контекст, факти, вимоги та джерела.
skills.prompt: Проаналізуй задачу, виділи факти, ризики, невідомі та вхідні дані.

skills.name: Strategic Planner
skills.description: Розбиває задачу на етапи та залежності.
skills.prompt: Побудуй покроковий план виконання з пріоритетами і залежностями.

skills.name: System Architect
skills.description: Проєктує структуру рішення, модулі, дані й інтеграції.
skills.prompt: Сформуй архітектуру, модулі, межі відповідальності і формат даних.

skills.name: Code Builder
skills.description: Генерує або покращує код.
skills.prompt: Реалізуй рішення чистим, підтримуваним кодом без зайвої магії.

skills.name: Code Reviewer
skills.description: Шукає баги, слабкі місця, edge cases.
skills.prompt: Перевір результат критично: баги, безпека, продуктивність, підтримка.

skills.name: QA Tester
skills.description: Формує сценарії перевірки та acceptance criteria.
skills.prompt: Створи тест-кейси, очікувані результати та критерії готовності.

skills.name: Security Auditor
skills.description: Перевіряє ризики безпеки, доступи, секрети, інʼєкції.
skills.prompt: Оціни безпеку: auth, permissions, secrets, injections, data leakage.

skills.name: Technical Writer
skills.description: Готує README, документацію, інструкції.
skills.prompt: Опиши результат зрозуміло: як запустити, як користуватись, як підтримувати.

skills.name: Product Manager
skills.description: Формує цінність, scope, MVP, roadmap.
skills.prompt: Виділи бізнес-цінність, MVP, обмеження, backlog і наступні кроки.

skills.name: Task Executor
skills.description: Виконує практичні кроки та збирає фінальний результат.
skills.prompt: Зведи попередні результати в готовий практичний output.

skills.name: Email Reader
skills.description: Підготовка поштових запитів, фільтрів, summary inbox.
skills.prompt: Сформуй точний email-search план: sender, subject, date, labels, next action.

skills.name: Email Sender
skills.description: Готує або надсилає email через SMTP/API.
skills.prompt: Підготуй лист: subject, recipients, body, tone, call-to-action.

skills.name: External API Connector
skills.description: HTTP API інтеграції, headers, auth, payload, retry.
skills.prompt: Опиши API-виклик: method, url, headers, payload, retries, error handling.

skills.name: Webhook Handler
skills.description: Прийом і маршрутизація webhook events.
skills.prompt: Розбери event, визнач тип, payload, idempotency key і наступну дію.

skills.name: Database Query
skills.description: SQL/NoSQL запити, схеми, міграції, агрегації.
skills.prompt: Сформуй безпечний запит, поясни таблиці, індекси і ризики.

skills.name: File Manager
skills.description: Робота з файлами, JSON, Markdown, експортами.
skills.prompt: Підготуй структуру файлів, назви, формат і контент.

skills.name: Calendar Scheduler
skills.description: Події, дедлайни, календарні правила.
skills.prompt: Підготуй календарний план, RRULE або cron, дедлайни і reminders.

skills.name: CRM Updater
skills.description: Оновлення лідів, deals, notes, tasks у CRM.
skills.prompt: Визнач CRM-сутність, поля, статус, коментар і next follow-up.

skills.name: GitHub Operator
skills.description: Issues, PR, branches, code review, release notes.
skills.prompt: Підготуй GitHub-дію: issue/PR/branch/release, title, body, labels.

skills.name: Telegram Notifier
skills.description: Повідомлення у Telegram/чат-канали.
skills.prompt: Стисни результат у коротке повідомлення з пріоритетом і дією.

skills.name: Developer
skills.description: Reads project files, proposes code changes, writes patches, and explains implementation.

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Reviews code for bugs, architecture issues, security, and maintainability.

skills.name: File Read
skills.description: Reads files from a configured workspace folder.

skills.name: File Write
skills.description: Writes generated output files into the workspace.

skills.name: Folder Scan
skills.description: Scans folder tree and summarizes project structure.

skills.name: Git Status
skills.description: Runs safe git status/log/diff commands in the workspace.

skills.name: Git Patch
skills.description: Prepares patch-style output for applying changes manually or with a worker.

skills.name: HTTP API
skills.description: Calls external APIs with method, headers, and JSON body.

skills.name: Email Read
skills.description: Plans email reading/searching via SMTP/IMAP or provider API connector.

skills.name: Email Send
skills.description: Sends email via SMTP when configured.

skills.name: MCP Client
skills.description: Describes how an agent should use attached MCP servers/tools.

skills.name: Database
skills.description: Plans SQL queries and database checks; execution should be attached explicitly.

skills.name: QA
skills.description: Creates test cases, checks edge cases, and verifies done criteria.

skills.name: Documentation
skills.description: Writes README, changelog, API docs, and technical notes.

skills.name: Product Owner
skills.description: Clarifies user value, scope, priorities, and release slicing.

skills.name: Final Summary
skills.description: Combines all previous outputs into a clean final result.

skills.name: Telegram API
skills.description: Prepares Telegram bot/API actions.

skills.name: GitHub API
skills.description: Plans GitHub issues, PRs, comments, and repository API usage.

skills.name: CRM API
skills.description: Prepares CRM actions: leads, deals, contacts, tasks.

skills.name: Calendar API
skills.description: Prepares calendar events, reminders, and schedule checks.

skills.name: Shell Command Plan
skills.description: Prepares safe shell commands for manual execution, without running destructive commands automatically.
skills.prompt: Prepare safe terminal commands, explain each command and risks.

skills.name: Dependency Audit
skills.description: Reviews package dependencies, install speed, native modules, version pinning and lockfile risks.
skills.prompt: Audit dependencies for installation speed, stability, native modules and version conflicts.

skills.name: CI/CD
skills.description: Designs GitHub Actions or other CI/CD checks and release workflows.
skills.prompt: Prepare CI/CD workflow: install, lint, test, build, release.

skills.name: Log Analysis
skills.description: Reads logs and extracts root causes, errors, timelines and next actions.
skills.prompt: Analyze logs, identify root cause and propose exact fix steps.

skills.name: Patch Apply Plan
skills.description: Creates patch application instructions and safety checks before write operations.
skills.prompt: Prepare patch instructions, files changed and rollback notes.

skills.name: Codebase Map
skills.description: Builds a precise map of source folders, entry points, configs, scripts and module boundaries.

skills.name: Code Generation
skills.description: Produces complete files, components, services, routes and small working implementations.

skills.name: Patch Writer
skills.description: Produces exact file-level patches and implementation notes that can be applied to a workspace.

skills.name: Test Runner
skills.description: Plans safe test commands, verifies expected output and reports failures.

skills.name: Safe Shell
skills.description: Plans allowlisted shell commands for install/build/test/git operations with human approval.

skills.name: Docker Ops
skills.description: Prepares Dockerfile, compose, container commands, volumes, env and logs.

skills.name: Observability
skills.description: Adds logging, metrics, tracing, health checks and run diagnostics.

skills.name: Vector Memory
skills.description: Plans retrieval memory for project notes, docs, decisions and agent context.

skills.name: RAG Search
skills.description: Searches project/document context and injects relevant chunks into the agent task.

skills.name: Browser Automation
skills.description: Plans browser navigation, extraction, screenshots and form automation through an MCP/browser tool.

mcps.description: Робота з файлами, MD, JSON, експортами.

mcps.name: GitHub MCP

mcps.name: Filesystem MCP
mcps.description: File and folder tools for local projects.

mcps.name: Shell MCP

mcps.name: Docker MCP

mcps.name: CI/CD MCP
mcps.description: CI runs, workflow files and release automation metadata.

mcps.name: Playwright Browser MCP

mcps.name: Safe Terminal MCP

mcps.name: Memory/RAG MCP

mcps.name: Linear/Jira MCP

mcps.name: Vercel MCP

flows.name: Full Project Team: analyze → implement → QA → docs
flows.task: Analyze the provided project folder, identify problems, propose changes, implement or prepare patch instructions, review quality/security, and prepare final documentation.

steps.note: Extract exact goal, constraints, expected deliverable and acceptance criteria.
Scan the project tree and identify stack, entry points, package/dependency risks and important files.
Delegate work between developer, QA, security and docs agents.
Prepare exact file changes or patch-style implementation. Keep dependencies minimal.
Verify the proposed implementation against acceptance criteria and list test cases.
Review filesystem, git, env and API actions for safety issues.
Update README/install/use instructions in English.
Combine all previous outputs into one final delivery summary.

flows.name: Software Delivery Squad
flows.task: Take a software task from idea to delivery: requirements, architecture, frontend/backend implementation, QA, security and release notes.

steps.note: Collect context and unknowns.
Create execution plan and dependencies.
Design architecture, modules and data contracts.
Define or implement backend endpoints and persistence.
Define or implement UI changes and UX details.
Run code audit with critical/medium/low findings.
Prepare QA cases and acceptance criteria.
Prepare release checklist and changelog.
Finalize result and notification summary.

flows.name: API + Email Automation Team
flows.task: Design an automation that reads or prepares email actions, connects external APIs, stores results and notifies stakeholders.

steps.note: Clarify triggers, data sources, recipients and approval rules.
Prepare email read/draft/send workflow. Do not send without explicit approval.
Design API/webhook calls with auth, retries, logs and idempotency.
Prepare concrete endpoint contracts and database touchpoints.
Check secrets, permissions and accidental data leakage.
Document setup, env variables and usage example.
Prepare final automation plan and next steps.

flows.name: Install & Dependency Fix Flow
flows.task: Find why installation is slow or failing, simplify dependencies, update scripts, and prepare README troubleshooting.

steps.note: Inspect package files, scripts and folder structure.
Audit Node/npm versions, package manager config and install risks.
Propose minimal dependency changes and script updates.
List verification commands for install, dev, build and API health.
Write English install and troubleshooting documentation.
Prepare version note and rollback plan.

flows.name: CRM Sales Follow-up Team
flows.task: Process leads, prepare CRM updates, draft follow-up emails and send a concise Telegram summary.

steps.note: Collect lead context and missing fields.
Prepare CRM status, notes and next follow-up.
Draft email response/follow-up. Do not send without approval.
Prepare API actions for CRM/email/Telegram connectors.
Finalize concise action summary.

flows.name: Imported: Main autonomous chain
flows.task: Створи повний план запуску нового продукту від ідеї до релізу.

flows.name: Imported: Main autonomous chain
flows.task: Створи повний план запуску нового продукту від ідеї до релізу.

flows.name: Top-level autonomous developer team loop
flows.task: Given a local project folder and a user task, scan the project, define requirements, implement exact file changes, review them, test them, document them, and summarize final artifacts.

steps.note: Extract exact deliverable and acceptance criteria from the user task.
Scan the workspace and identify files that must be changed.
Design the minimal architecture and data flow before implementation.
Implement exact file changes. Produce full files or patch blocks. Do not stay abstract.
Check the implementation and return concrete defects or approval.
Review unsafe file, git, shell, env and API operations.
Write English README/update notes for installation and usage.
Return final result with generated artifacts and next commands.
